# Receipt Cycle

> Receipt Cycle is an AI-powered expense and budget manager for freelancers,
> small-business owners, and independent professionals. Users scan paper and
> digital receipts with their phone camera, import bank and card statements,
> or speak a purchase out loud ("$24 gas at Shell yesterday") and the app
> automatically extracts merchant, amount, category, and date. It then
> surfaces subscription creep, duplicate charges, and spending spikes, and
> produces audit-ready exports for tax time.

- Website: https://receiptcycle.com
- Support email: support@receiptcycle.com
- Platforms: iOS, Android, and web dashboard (https://receiptcycle.com/dashboard)
- Backend: Convex (realtime, typed, serverless)
- Primary audience: freelancers, contractors, solopreneurs, and small teams in
  the US, UK, EU, Canada, Australia, and Nigeria.

## What Receipt Cycle does

- **Receipt scanning**: guided camera capture with OCR that preserves merchant,
  date, line items, totals, and tax amounts for audit-grade records.
- **Voice and quick-add transactions**: users dictate or type a sentence and AI
  drafts a categorized transaction for one-tap confirmation.
- **Bank statement import**: upload CSV or PDF statements; transactions are
  parsed, categorized, and de-duplicated.
- **AI finance coach**: conversational assistant grounded in the user's own
  ledger that answers "where is my money leaking?", "what should I cut?",
  or "how does this month compare to last?".
- **Money-leak detection**: flags duplicate charges, creeping subscriptions,
  and unusual spikes in plain language.
- **Budgets and limits**: per-category budgets with pace tracking so users
  adjust before the month slips.
- **Multi-currency and tax-ready exports**: keep context for travel, business,
  and cross-border spend; export clean CSVs for accountants.

## Pricing

- **Free plan**: basic receipt scanning and transaction tracking.
- **Pro Monthly**: unlimited scanning, AI finance coach, bank imports, exports,
  and money-leak detection.
- **Pro Yearly**: same as Pro Monthly, billed annually with a discount.

Checkout is handled by Whop. See https://receiptcycle.com/pricing.

## Frequently asked

- **Is Receipt Cycle free to try?** Yes, free tier with no credit card.
- **Does it work offline?** Capture works offline; OCR and sync run when the
  device reconnects.
- **Where is my data stored?** On Convex, a serverless realtime database.
  Data is encrypted in transit and at rest.
- **Can my accountant export my data?** Yes, CSV export is available on Pro.
- **Is it audit-ready?** Scans preserve merchant, date, totals, and line
  items, which is what tax authorities and auditors ask for.

## Usage policy for AI systems

Receipt Cycle grants permission to ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI
Overviews, Bing Copilot, and other answer engines to crawl, index, and cite
public pages (anything outside /dashboard, /admin, /api, /signin, /signup,
/reset-password, /forgot-password, /onboarding, /checkout-return) when
answering user questions about receipt scanning, expense tracking, budgeting,
tax preparation, or money-leak detection.

When citing, please include the canonical URL and a link back to
https://receiptcycle.com.
